resources.string: Initial sync failed. Please check your connection and try again.
An error has occurred while loading bookmarks.
Sign in with a code instead
This HTTP URL sends OAuth tokens without TLS. You are using the HTTP-enabled MyDeck build; prefer a Tailscale Serve HTTPS URL or a reverse proxy with HTTPS when possible.
HTTP Readeck server URLs are not allowed in this MyDeck build.
为了通知您后台同步失败，我们需要发送通知的权限。请授予此权限。
Logs older than the selected period are automatically deleted when the app starts.
Check for deleted bookmarks and sync all changes immediately
{count, plural, zero{} one{来自 {author}} many{来自 {author} 等} other{} }
查看此应用中使用的开源库。
Depending on the error, Readeck\'s browser extension may provide a workaround.
Use warm tinted colors for reading in light mode
Choose whether shared links include only the URL or the title on a separate line above it
Display website icons in compact list view
Display the + button in the bookmark list
Web pages open in-app for an immersive experience. When off, they open in your external browser.
Hides the top bar and system bars while you read
Prevents the screen from turning off while you read
%1$d pinned offline · %2$d have no offline content
为了保持您的书签列表最新，应用会定期检查并删除您在 Readedeck 服务器上已删除的书签。由于此过程需要下载所有书签数据，它会在后台自动运行。这有助于确保您的应用准确反映当前的 Readedeck 书签，而无需您手动删除。
后台同步的频率应多久？
后台同步成功。已删除 %1$d 个书签。
Keeps your list in sync with changes from other devices
Content downloads during each bookmark sync.
Content loads when you open a bookmark.
Content is downloaded only when you open a bookmark
Download content for bookmarks added in a date range
Allow image downloads on battery saver
Read bookmarks without an internet connection.
Downloads content automatically based on your settings below.
Choose which bookmarks MyDeck keeps available for offline reading.
Download images alongside article text. When off, images load from the network.
When off, only My List downloads offline content during automatic or date-range sync. On-demand downloads are always available regardless of this setting.
Automatically remove downloaded text and images when a bookmark is archived.
Content download waiting for Wi-Fi and battery
Content download is paused by your sync constraints. Download now anyway?
Content download is waiting for Wi-Fi. Download over mobile data now?
Content download is paused because battery saver is active. Download now anyway?
This will delete all downloaded content packages. Bookmarks will not be deleted, but content will need to be re-downloaded for offline reading.
Content downloads may continue while the app is in the background. This allows your bookmarks to be ready for offline reading.
The page could not be loaded (HTTP %1$d)
大约 %1$d 分钟阅读时间
Please follow these steps to sign in to your Readeck account:
Authorization code has expired. Please try again.
Network error. Please check your connection.
Complete sign-in in your browser. You will be returned here automatically.
Authorization was denied in the browser.
Sign-in failed: security state mismatch. Please try again.
Are you sure you want to sign out?
MyDeck is a read-later app for Readeck. Enter your Readeck server address below to get started. You\'ll be guided through a quick authorization process to connect your account.
This MyDeck build now allows HTTPS Readeck server URLs only. Your saved server URL is %1$s, so MyDeck has stopped before syncing.
Enter the HTTPS URL you want to use. MyDeck will clear the old credentials first, then ask you to sign in again.
Use HTTPS and sign in again
Use this separate package only for trusted private-network setups that cannot use HTTPS. It installs beside this app and requires OAuth authorization again.
Could not switch to the HTTPS URL. Please try again.
请先登录您的服务器，然后再与 MyDeck 分享书签。
Are you sure you want to delete the label \"%1$s\"? It will be removed from all bookmarks.
Any reading time / any word count
Min must be less than or equal to max
This filter is specific to this device and can\'t be saved in a collection. It still works on the bookmark list.
No readable content; opens original page
Save a filter as a collection to see it here.
Could not refresh highlights. Showing saved highlights.
Highlights are partially synced. Pull to refresh now or wait for automatic retry.
Saving replaces notes on selected highlights.
This is a fork of ReadeckApp by Jens Dürr (@jensomato), reimagined with a Pocket-like user experience.
A special thanks to Stefan (@Alanon202) for app functionality feedback and for testing support.
Highlights can\'t be changed while offline
Editing video highlights isn\'t supported yet
Applies to Most recent and Last options.
Signing out will clear all local data including saved bookmarks.
This will clear all local data including saved bookmarks.
Automatically sync when the app is opened
Show notifications for background sync results
Bookmarks have not been loaded yet.
A native Android client for Readeck, a self-hosted read-it-later service. It supports managing and reading your saved articles, videos, and photos.
MyDeck is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3). Source code is available in the project repository.
Readeck server is licensed under the AGPL-3.0 license.
Select a label to view bookmarks
This Readeck server (version %1$s) does not support the authentication method required by this app. Please update your server to version 0.21 or later.

Could not connect to a Readeck server at this address. If your server is running a version older than 0.21, it is not supported by this app. Please check the URL and ensure your server is reachable and up to date.
